message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor white
skinparam lifelineBorderColor white
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam participantBorderColor white
skinparam participantFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor white
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam controlBackgroundColor #D3D3D3
skinparam controlBorderColor white
skinparam controlFontColor black
skinparam entityBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam entityBorderColor white
skinparam entityFontColor black

actor " " as A
participant "<<boundary>>\nZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as B1
participant "<<boundary>>\nZMDomačaStran" as B2
control "<<control>>\nKrmilnikRegistracija" as C
entity "<<entity>>\nUporabnik" as E

A -> B1: 
activate B1
B1 -> B2: 
activate B2
B2 -> C: 
activate C
C -> E: 
activate E
E --> C: 
deactivate E
C --> B2: 
deactivate C
B2 --> B1: 
deactivate B2
B1 --> A: 
deactivate B1

@enduml
